name: Cordless Impact Drill Driver
shortDescription: Two-speed drill driver for bracket mounting and general fixing work.
longDescription: A two-speed cordless drill driver for mounting extinguisher brackets, signage and hydrant fixtures into masonry, steel and timber substrates. Keyless chuck for fast bit changes and a variable-speed trigger for control across drilling and driving tasks.

images.alt: Cordless Impact Drill Driver supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
